title: U.S. judge orders Norwegian Cruise Line to pay $110 mln for use of Cuba port
text: Norwegian Cruise Line must pay $110 million in damages for use of a port that Cuba's government confiscated in 1960, according to a ruling by a U.S. judge released on Friday.

title: Why Carnival and Other Cruise Stocks Sank on Thursday
text: Investors just woke up to the fact that Carnival's fourth-quarter earnings report actually wasn't that great.

title: Does The Recent Sell Off And Falling Crude Oil Prices Make Norwegian Stock A Buy?
text: Norwegian Cruise Line stock has declined by close to 10% over the last month (about 21 trading days), underperforming the broader S&P 500 which remained roughly flat over the same period.

title: Cruise lines will continue to offer cheap cruises into 2023 — but they might not stick around for long
text: In 2021, cruise lines like Carnival and Royal Caribbean started offering fares for as low as $29 a day to fill ships. They could soon vanish.

title: 10 Companies Will Thrive During Next Year's Recession, Analysts
text: Recession is likely next year, at least according to the bond market. But some S&P 500 companies will skate right through it, analysts say.

title: Here's Why Investors Should Retain Norwegian Cruise (NCLH) Now
text: Norwegian Cruise (NCLH) intends to focus on its booking window to drive the top line. However, the absence of premium-priced Baltic itineraries due to the Russia-Ukraine conflict is a concern.

title: Norwegian Stock Is a Buy, Royal Caribbean Is a Sell, Says This Analyst. Here's Why.
text: J.P. Morgan analyst Daniel Adam assumes coverage of Royal Caribbean with an Underweight rating from Overweight. He has an Overweight rating on Norwegian Cruise Line.
